description: start [extract ethernet] -> parse_myTunnel [extract myTunnel] -> parse_ipv4 [extract ipv4] -> MyIngress.ipv4_lpm
z3_constraints_smt2:
(let ((a!1 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000003))
                #b000000011
                #b111111111)))
(let ((a!2 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000002))
                #b000000010
                a!1)))
(let ((a!3 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000001))
                #b000000001
                a!2)))
  (distinct a!3 #b111111111))))

       #b000000001
       a!2)))
field_updates.ethernet.dstAddr:
(let ((a!1 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000003))
                #x000000000303
                ethernet.dstAddr)))
(let ((a!2 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000002))

                a!1)))
  (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000001))

field_updates.ethernet.srcAddr:
(let ((a!1 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000003))

                ethernet.srcAddr)))
(let ((a!2 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000002))

  (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000001))

field_updates.ipv4.ttl:
(let ((a!1 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000003))
                (bvand (bvadd ipv4.ttl #xff) #xff)
                ipv4.ttl)))
(let ((a!2 (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000002))
                (bvand (bvadd ipv4.ttl #xff) #xff)
                a!1)))
  (ite (and true (= (bvand ipv4.dstAddr #xffffffff) #x0a000001))

       a!2)))
